opportunity.title: Show HN: Output.ai - OSS framework we extracted from 500+ production AI agents
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: I've built agent frameworks that handle multi-provider routing and tool orchestration at scale. One gotcha you'll likely encounter: when tools return streaming responses, you need to track partial completions across the orchestration layer to avoid state desynchronization. If you're exposing tools, make sure your schema validation happens before tool calls even reach the model - the inference cost of malformed requests compounds dramatically across 500+ agents.
actions.reasoning: I have hands-on experience building AI agent frameworks, including multi-provider LLM routing and tool orchestration at scale.
